description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. The individual is dressed in a casual, long-sleeved knit sweater and fitted jeans, paired with athletic sneakers. The face is rounded with a neutral expression, and the hair is cut in a straight, shoulder-length bob with bangs. The hands are relaxed and fingers slightly splayed, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance suggests a typical city dweller, ready for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or public spaces.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright, wearing a sweater, jeans, and sneakers, with a straight shoulder-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sweater, jeans, and sneakers, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, sweater, jeans, and the relaxed posture of the arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the footwear and hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved sweater and fitted jeans
